name: Empire State Realty Trust, Inc.
business: Empire State Realty Trust, Inc. is a real estate investment trust that owns and operates a portfolio of office, retail, and multifamily properties in New York City. It also operates the Empire State Building Observatory, a tourist attraction. The company leases commercial space to tenants and sells tickets to the Observatory.

exposures.sentence: We license the use of the Empire State Building broadcasting mast to third-party television and radio broadcasters.
Cyberattacks and any failure to comply with related laws could negatively impact us.
We have begun the use of AI capabilities in our business and operations.

catalysts.sentence: Our next mortgage debt maturity is for $50.0 million in April 2026.
